series_metadata.series_title: FMLA /ADA Accomodation files, and Title VII, ADA and GINA Charges
series_metadata.series_description: All pertinent information relating to requests for FMLA/ADA leave and/or accomodation requests, related examinations, medical documentation and correspondence. Also includes files pertaining to Title VII, ADA and Genetic Information Non-Discrimination Act of 2008 (GINA) discrimination charges.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in active files employee separation, six years from date of action taken and/or latter of expiration of a statutory period within which an aggrieved person may bring an action in United States District Court
